titleStmt.title: SII 22.82: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 82. (A.R. No. 82 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, JAMBAI. JAMBUNĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. PAR. RĀJĒNDRA CHŌḶA (I)—25th YEAR (A.D. 1036-37)

summary.p: This records an agreement given by the Nagarattār of Vāḷaiyūr alias Nittavinōdapuram on the northern bank of the Peṇṇai, situated in Vāṇagappāḍi alias Madhurāntaka-vaḷanāḍu in Jayangoṇḍaśōḻamaṇḍalam to the temple of Tāntōṉṟiuḍaiya-Mahādēvar, that they would meet the cost of burning the perpetual lamps and of the other requirements in the temple to which they had been (previously) committed, by means of certain specified imposts on their articles of merchandise.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koparakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājentiraco
ḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 10 5Āvatu jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu vāṇakappāṭiyaāna maturānta
kavaḷanāṭṭu peṇṇai vaṭakarai vāḷaiyūrākiya nitta
vinotapurattu nakarattom Eṅkaḷūr tiruttāntonṟi
yuṭaiya[mahāte]vaṟku nāṅkaḷ kalveṭṭṭupaṭi Erikkakaṭa
va tirununtāviḷakkukkaḷukkum kalveṭṭupaṭi kaṭava poliū
ṭṭu nivantaṅkaḷukkum Eṅkaḷūr kālaḷavupāṭṭam kalattuvā
y koḷvāru nāḻiyum kuṭuppār nāḻiyum koṟkūli Oru niṟaikku ko
ḷḷuvān Oru palamum kuṭuppān Oru palamum Alaku pākku Āyirattu
vāy pattum puṟavari varaippotiyāl nāḻiyum Ittaṉaiyum
Ittevaṟkku nāṅkaḷ kaṭava nivantaṅkaḷukku kaṇṭaḻivāka canti
rātitavarai niṟka ceytukuṭuttom Itunāl vanta Evattevai
Eppeṟpaṭṭitum kāttūṭṭuvatānom nakarattom Itu I
ṟakkuvān Eḻunarakattu kiḻnarakam pukuvān Itu panmā
yecuvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.82 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
